item_text: vuoi aggiornare l'account? — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="user wants to update account"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profile-002 title: user updates personal data module: profile source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in and on the profillo page. test data: updated personal data. test steps: 1. user is on the profillo page. 2. user selects to update personal data. 3. application prompts the user to confirm the update. 4. user confirms the update. 5. user provides updated personal data. 6. application sends the updated data to the server. 7. server processes the updated data. 8. server confirms the update. 9. application displays the updated personal data to the user. expected result: user sees the updated personal data on the profillo page.

item_text: vuoi aggiornare l'account? — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="user does not want to update account"

item_text: vuoi uscire dall'account? — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="user wants to logout"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profile-003 title: user logs out module: profile source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in and on the profillo page. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. user is on the profillo page. 2. user selects to log out. 3. application prompts the user to confirm the logout. 4. user confirms the logout. 5. application sends a logout request to the server. 6. server processes the logout request. 7. server confirms the logout. 8. application redirects the user to the home page. expected result: user is redirected to the home page.

item_text: vuoi uscire dall'account? — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="user does not want to logout"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-sequence-001 title: user logs in successfully module: authentication source pages: 5 preconditions: user has never accessed the app before. test data: valid username and password. test steps: 1. user opens the app. 2. user is prompted to enter credentials. 3. user enters valid username and password. 4. application sends credentials to the server. 5. server verifies credentials against the database. 6. server confirms valid credentials. 7. application compares entered credentials with those in the database. 8. application informs the user that the login was successful. expected result: user is redirected to the home page.
